name: Veal Oscar #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound veal thin.
2. Heat 3 tbsp margarine in a large skillet over medium heat. Add veal and brown on both sides; keep warm.
3. In a saucepan, melt 4 tbsp margarine.
4. Stir in flour and mix until smooth. Add milk, white wine, salt, Worcestershire Sauce, and pepper. Cook on medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
5. Add seafood sections.
6. Arrange veal in a single layer in a shallow baking dish. Place asparagus over veal and top with sauce.
7. Bake in a 425°F oven until heated through and bubbly.
